package.name: PanelOptimizer
package.description: FreeCAD Workbench for preparing large artistic panels for FDM 3D printing. The workbench analyses geometry, computes optimized split paths, generates invisible joinery and exports printable STL parts.

workbench.name: PanelOptimizer
workbench.description: Intelligent preparation of artistic panels for multi-part 3D printing.
